column1: IRIS Clothings Limited, incorporated in 1956, is engaged in designing, manufacturing, branding and selling garments for kids. [1] Iris Clothings Limited is a fast-growing readymade garment company and is engaged in designing, manufacturing, branding and selling garments for kids wear under the brand name DOREME in India. It produces a broad range of unique apparels for infants, toddlers and junior boys and girls.
